prompt: Let users select multiple projects and act on them at once (archive, reassign, change status).
context: InterfaceBench longitudinal · Round 2 · adds multi-select bulk actions to the Round-1 list
expected_behaviour: model selection as a first-class state set: none, one, many, select-all, partial/indeterminate
show a contextual action bar only with a selection, announcing the selected count
make selection keyboard-operable and resilient to sorting
guard destructive bulk actions with confirm and/or undo
reuse the Round-1 system rather than introducing a new pattern
judgement: Pass if the full selection state set (incl. indeterminate and empty-selection) is present, keyboard-operable, count-announced, with safe destructive actions.
